tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down on a two-lane road
Sun is settin' painted gold
Radio playin' our summer song
Nowhere to go but we're drivin' on

[Pre-Chorus]
Every mile feels like a memory
Every sunset's burnin' brighter

[Chorus]
Golden days and firefly nights
Your hand in mine feels so right
Summer's callin' can you hear the sound
Let's chase the light before the sun goes down
Golden days won't last forever
But tonight we got forever weather

[Verse 2]
Barefoot in the tall grass green
Livin' in a small town dream
Lemonade and the county fair
Wind blowin' through your summer hair

[Chorus]
Golden days and firefly nights
Your hand in mine feels so right
Summer's callin' can you hear the sound
Let's chase the light before the sun goes down

[Bridge]
Stars are comin' out to play
Hold me close don't let this fade away

[Outro]
Golden days, golden days

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Luces de neón en la ventana
Me pierdo en tu nombre cada mañana
Floating through the city half awake
Dreaming in a language I can't shake

[Pre-Chorus]
Tell me where the night goes
When the stars fade out

[Chorus]
Soñando contigo
Under neon skies
Soñando contigo
Can't close my eyes
Every time I try to let you go
You pull me back into the glow

[Verse 2]
Café con leche at the corner store
Your laugh echoing down every floor
Vintage records spinning in my mind
Leaving all the ordinary behind

[Chorus]
Soñando contigo
Under neon skies
Soñando contigo
Can't close my eyes

[Outro]
Soñando, soñando
Under neon skies

tracks.description:
The vast Mongolian steppe calls — ancient throat singing meets horsehead fiddle under the Eternal Blue Sky.

🎵 Khöömii (throat singing) is a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage. The morin khuur (horsehead fiddle) carries the spirit of Mongolian nomads across endless grasslands.
